LightningComponentBundle.description: Disables pull-to-refresh behavior on Salesforce mobile apps. Add this component to your Flow or page to prevent unwanted refresh gestures.

property.name: enablePullToRefresh
property.label: Enable Pull To Refresh
property.description: Enable pull-to-refresh gesture on mobile (defaults to disabled)

property.name: enablePullToShowMore
property.label: Enable Pull To Show More
property.description: Enable pull-to-show-more gesture on mobile (defaults to disabled)
